title: Fix test suite — get critical tests passing
description:
STILL BROKEN — build fails. src/runtime/embed.js line 1 imports { embed } from agentic-embed but agentic-embed does NOT export embed. Build error:

SyntaxError: The requested module agentic-embed does not provide an export named embed

Tests pass (161 files, 777 passed) because they mock the import, but node src/index.js crashes.

Fix: change the import to use a valid export from agentic-embed (likely localEmbed or create). Check what agentic-embed actually exports and use the correct one.

This is a P0 build blocker — the service cannot start.
